This already affordable display typically sells for around $210, but it’s now available at an even steeper discount with 38% off. Today’s deal knocks $80 off its usual going rate, marking the lowest price we’ve tracked for this model. While Amazon has a few third-party listings floating around for about $156 with mixed reviews, Newegg’s offer is the one to grab if you want the best price at the moment. It’s now going for $18 less than the previous all-time low we tracked for it, and it delivers some serious value today. Head below for more details.

items.title: EcoFlow 72-hour flash sale drops DELTA 3 power station + 110W solar panel to new $559 low, more from $458
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Power Station Sale, EcoFlow has launched another 72-hour flash sale window that gives you up to 63% savings on four different units. One notable return (at a lower price) is the DELTA 3 Portable Power Station with a 110W solar panel at $559 shipped, with the closest matching bundle at Amazon being the one with a 160W panel sitting $139 higher. The package is usually listed at a $1,497 MSRP, with the station by itself currently down at $499 (matching at Amazon), while the solar panel is down at $169 (with no Amazon listing available), which means you save $109 during this 3-day flash sale at the lowest new price we have tracked, beating last week’s similar flash sale offer by $10. Head below to learn all about it and the other deals included in this short-term event.

items.title: Amazon 2026 Prime Day sale reportedly arriving a month early this year
items.summary:
Amazon’s annual Prime Day is one of the biggest sale events of the year, and it may arrive earlier than usual this time around. The retailer is reportedly planning to move the event to June instead of July, which has been the typical timing since Prime Day first launched in 2015. There’s no official confirmation directly from Amazon on this just yet, and the information reportedly comes from “people familiar with the matter.” While we’re currently waiting for a round of Spring deals, it seems even bigger discounts could be just around the corner this year.
